message:
test(e2e): update wills article spec for restructured anchors

Align the Playwright spec with the new 9-section article structure.

SECTION_ANCHORS:
  - remove: install, who, insight, intake, produces, workflow, anti
  - add: cost, what-is-it, setup, folder, tips, showcase
  - keep: attorney, faq, pattern

VIZ_IDS:
  - remove: axiom-coherence, intake-phases (sections cut)
  - add: install-flow, working-folder (embedded in setup + folder
    sections)
  - install-flow + working-folder content-marker regex relaxed to
    /./ for now; tighten once viz bodies settle

Install-section test recast for the new setup section: asserts the
four numbered prerequisite steps (frontier-model subscription,
desktop app, jsm.md account, install the skill) and that
InstallFlowViz mounts inside the setup section.

bun tsc --noEmit clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
